periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 76. Southwest wind around 12 mph.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 97. Heat index values as high as 105. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

periods.name: Thursday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 77. Heat index values as high as 100. Southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Friday
periods.short_forecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Sunny, with a high near 97. Heat index values as high as 104. West wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
